title: Item Data
description: Schema for all item files in data/items/. One file per item, named by item_id (e.g. potion.json).

category.description: Item category for bag sorting and behavior.

effect.description: Effect description or effect ID. e.g. 'heal_20hp', 'prevent_ice_slip', 'cleanse_corruption_stage'

effect_value.description: Numeric value for the effect (e.g. HP healed, stat stages). Null if not applicable.

buy_price.description: Buy price in Pokédollars. Null if not purchasable.

sell_price.description: Sell price. Null if not sellable.

is_key_item.description: True if this is a key item (not consumable, not tradeable).

is_custom.description: True if this item is unique to Primal Harmony.

zone_association.description: Zone ID this item is associated with, if it's a zone-specific traversal item. Null otherwise.
